mapper.select: SELECT c.*, v.name AS visitor_name, v.phone AS visitor_phone, v.id_card AS visitor_id_card FROM biz_check_in c LEFT JOIN biz_visitor v ON c.visitor_id = v.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.check_in_status IN (1, 4) ORDER BY c.check_in_date DESC
SELECT c.*, v.name AS visitor_name FROM biz_check_in c LEFT JOIN biz_visitor v ON c.visitor_id = v.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.check_in_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, v.name AS visitor_name FROM biz_check_in c LEFT JOIN biz_visitor v ON c.visitor_id = v.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND ((c.check_in_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}) OR (c.check_out_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate})) ORDER BY c.check_in_date DESC
